title: Orthodontic electronic appliances
abstract: Electronic wireless orthodontic appliances depend on its self by using micromotor in its components taking the wireless orders from a remote control through a wireless network with a small battery in it giving them the needed power. It can be applicated in three systems as a bracket which make all tooth movements, a palatal expander (hyrax simulator) which make expansion to the palate and electronic retractor or protractor (facemask simulator) which can make protraction or retraction to the maxilla. All of it have two parts,intra oral appliance and extra oral remote control which control it with a wireless control.
claims:
Claims Claims 1- Any wireless electronic orthodontic appliance characterized by two parts . Its oral part contain a small wireless board less than 1 cm * 1 cm connected with the micromotor which make the movement . The wireless board contain a micro battery( alkaline low drain 1.55 v its size 4.8* 1.6 mm 8 mAh ) for power supply , electrical resistance , zener diode, reciveing unit and extral oral part a remote control of normal size with its components a joystick for control , battery for power supply . No wire connection between these parts , transmission unit in remote control first LC resonant circuit having a first resonant frequency, and the wireless receiving unit comprising a second LC resonant circuit, The second LC resonant tank has a second resonant frequency. . 2-Electronic bracket which is the first application of it characterized by intraoral part of Small wirless board less than 1 cm * lcm with its components Small battery ( alkaline low drain 1.55 v its size 4.8* 1.6 mm 8 mAh ) connected in the board ,two micromotor of size less than the size of the electronic bracket which connected to the board with four arms ,two vertical arms for vertical placed micromotor and two horizontal arms for horizontal placed micromotor .Outer cover made from plastic .Extra oral part remote control which composed of the wirless board with a battery , a joy stick, electrical resistance , zener diodeand sending circuit . 3- Electronic palatal expander (hyrax simulator ) characterized by intraoral part which contain central unit contain a small wireless board less than 1 cm * 1cm with its components of small battery , micromotor connected to the board and to the threaded part with two arms. The threaded part connect to the attachment part with its lock part and outer plastic cover and the attachment part of lock and band or lock with a 

 screw hole .extra oral part remote control which composed of the wireless board with a battery , a joy stick, electrical resistance , zener diode and sending circuit . 4â Electronic retractor or protractor (facemask simulator ) characterized by intraoral part in the shape of old man stick contain two parts the head part and the vertical shaft part . The head part contain micromotor of few millimeter size connected to threded arm then a lock part wich welded to the body of appliance .Wireless board of 1 cm* 1 cm size with its components a small battery , electrical resistance , zener diode and transmitting unit and extra oral part remote control which composed of the wireless board with a battery , a joy stick, electrical resistance , zener diode and sending circuit .
